description: Next.js 14+ App Router with React Server Components default. Customer-facing SaaS, content-heavy with some personalization, SEO matters. Hybrid SSR/RSC/SSG per route.

anti_recommendations.use-client-everywhere: kill — defeats the RSC value; reserve 'use client' for actual interactivity
anti_recommendations.global-state-in-context-everywhere: kill — props down + server state up; Context is for tree-scoped state only
anti_recommendations.csr-only-on-seo-routes: kill — RSC or SSR on routes that matter for SEO
anti_recommendations.redux-without-justification: warn — RTK is fine if you've shipped it; new project should default to Zustand/Jotai
anti_recommendations.css-in-js-runtime: kill — styled-components runtime mode breaks RSC; use tailwind or zero-runtime alternatives
anti_recommendations.default-imports-for-icons: kill — tree-shake hostile; use named imports from lucide

canon_references: Web Almanac (HTTP Archive, 2025) on Next.js distribution
Brad Frost, Atomic Design (2016) — for design system layering
